title: St. James's Place plc
description: A comprehensive encyclopedic overview of St. James's Place plc, detailing its corporate history, founding by Sir Mark Weinberg, Mike Wilson, and Lord Jacob Rothschild in 1991, its status as a FTSE 100 wealth management business, and its operational footprint across the UK.
author: Wikipedia Contributors

title: St. James's Place UK wealth management review
description: An in-depth review analyzing the benefits and potential drawbacks of St. James's Place wealth management. It highlights SJP's strong customer service rating (4.5/5 on Trustpilot), its relationship-focused advisory model, and its transition to a modernized, exit-fee-free fee structure under FCA Consumer Duty rules.
author: Unbiased Editorial Team

title: St. James's Place Pension Review 2026: The Cost of Comfort
description: An analytical review of St. James's Place's pension offerings and investment performance. It details the breakdown of SJP's modernized fee structure introduced in August 2025, compares restricted advice costs with self-directed SIPP alternatives, and examines fund performance metrics.
author: Alpesh Patel OBE
